check_healthyPositionBorrowing(uint256,u.notice: Prove: a healthy position always has borrowed <= collateral * price * lltv

check_interestAccrualSolvency(uint256,ui.notice: Prove: interest adds equally to borrow and supply (no value leak)

check_liquidationIncentiveBounded(uint25.notice: Prove: liquidation incentive never exceeds MAX_LIQUIDATION_INCENTIVE_FACTOR

check_repayReducesBorrow(uint256,uint256.notice: Prove: repaying assets always reduces totalBorrowAssets
